title: PA3's Farming
description: A mod that expands culinary possibilities in Minecraft.
body:
# About **PA3's Farming** expands the possibilities of farming and cooking in Minecraft. Using new farm crops, you can expand your daily diet! Many new dishes have been added to the game. ## Roaster ### Render ### About **Roaster** - it's one of the functional blocks of the mod. You can craft it with 5 copper ingots. You can bake and stew food in it. Requires heating - set a campfire under it. ## Cooking Pot ### Render ### About **Cooking Pot** - it's another one functional block of the mod. You can craft it with 5 iron ingots and water bucket. You can cook food in it. Requires heating too - set a campfire under it. ## Fish Trap ### Render ### About **Fish Trap** - it's functional block of the mod. You can craft it with strings, sticks and wooden slabs. This block catches fish once in a certain amount of time. Underwater trash will be caught without bait. # Screenshots
Spoiler
# Installation Requirements PA3's Farming runs on Neoforge. # Contact Write your suggestions and issues in Discord: https://discord.gg/TxRnWeBAtT
